name: Peanut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crust ingredients and press into a 9 x 13 pan.
2. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20 minutes.
3. Layer 2: Spread the cream cheese and peanut butter mixture over the crust. Add powdered sugar and fold in the cool whip.
4. Layer 3: Mix all ingredients together and spread over the cake.
5. Top with cool whip and crushed peanuts.
6. Refrigerate.
